raw: {"weights": {"R1.1": 0.0, "R1.2": 1.0, "R1.3": 1.0, "R1.4": 0.7, "R1.5": 0.0, "R1.6": 0.7, "R1.7": 0.7, "RX.1": 0.7, "RX.2": 1.0, "RX.3": 0.7, "RX.4": 0.3, "RX.5": 0.7}, "active_set": ["R1.2", "R1.3", "R1.4", "R1.6", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"], "category_focus": "R1", "clarification_needed": true, "clarification_question": "Given the vagueness of 'Check this.', is this a request for a comprehensive review (covering logic, evidence, novelty, writing, and scholarship) or a focused check on specific aspects?", "rationale": {"R1.2": "Verifying logical consistency is load-bearing for checking the argument chain in the proposed method and its validation.", "R1.3": "Assessing evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing to confirm if the reported metrics support the central claim of better human preference reflection.", "R1.4": "Novelty assessment is central to evaluating the delta against prior work on LLM-as-judge protocols mentioned in the artifact.", "R1.6": "Writing polish is central for checking sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness in this research draft.", "R1.7": "Citation and scholarship checking is central, especially given the references to prior work without specific attributions in the artifact.", "RX.1": "Uncertainty disclosure is central when checking the reliability and variance metrics presented.", "RX.2": "Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to ensure the conclusions about human alignment and adoption do not exceed the evidence.", "RX.3": "Scope adherence is central to verify the focus remains on automated evaluation for text-to-image generation.", "RX.4": "Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral, as the artifact deals with evaluation methods rather than direct generation of potentially harmful content.", "RX.5": "Provenance and traceability is central for the reproducibility of the panel's models and benchmark results."}}

parsed.clarification_question: Given the vagueness of 'Check this.', is this a request for a comprehensive review (covering logic, evidence, novelty, writing, and scholarship) or a focused check on specific aspects?

rationale.R1.2: Verifying logical consistency is load-bearing for checking the argument chain in the proposed method and its validation.
rationale.R1.3: Assessing evidence-claim alignment is load-bearing to confirm if the reported metrics support the central claim of better human preference reflection.
rationale.R1.4: Novelty assessment is central to evaluating the delta against prior work on LLM-as-judge protocols mentioned in the artifact.
rationale.R1.6: Writing polish is central for checking sentence-level grammar, flow, and conciseness in this research draft.
rationale.R1.7: Citation and scholarship checking is central, especially given the references to prior work without specific attributions in the artifact.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is central when checking the reliability and variance metrics presented.
rationale.RX.2: Overclaim avoidance is load-bearing to ensure the conclusions about human alignment and adoption do not exceed the evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is central to verify the focus remains on automated evaluation for text-to-image generation.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is peripheral, as the artifact deals with evaluation methods rather than direct generation of potentially harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability is central for the reproducibility of the panel's models and benchmark results.
